scripts.start: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "dotnet run --project api/HackerNewsApi" "cd frontend && npx ng serve"
scripts.test: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "dotnet test api/HackerNewsApi.Tests" "cd frontend && npx ng test --watch=false"
scripts.build: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "dotnet build api/HackerNewsApi" "cd frontend && npx ng build"
